title: BEM-781 check handoff
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:36 (UTC+3)'
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem780' in low or 'bem-780' in low or 'file-handoff response' in low or 'multi-agent architecture protocol' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision,'preview':txt[:800]})
if responses:
    status='real_file_handoff_response_found'
    blocker=None
    next_action='process real Claude file-handoff response and finalize or continue protocol'
else:
    status='real_file_handoff_response_pending'
    blocker={'code':'REAL_CLAUDE_FILE_HANDOFF_RESPONSE_PENDING','message':'BEM-780 request is committed. No real Claude response file found yet.'}
    next_action='continue mailbox monitoring; do not create new workflows and do not fake approval'
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem781_next_monitor_file_handoff_response.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-781 Next | Monitor file-handoff response'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-781 FILE-HANDOFF STATUS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'check_file_handoff_response_status.v1','bem':'BEM-781','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'responses':responses,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem781_check_file_handoff_response_status.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem781_check_file_handoff_response_status.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-781 | Check File-Handoff Response Status | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Responses: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem781_check_file_handoff_response_status','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem781_check_file_handoff_response_status.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-781 '+status+' responses='+str(len(responses))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked real Claude file-handoff response after restoring mailbox mode and routed next monitoring step without creating new workflows')
"""
No issue comments.
